items.raw_excerpt: This French expression has a vivid image of digging inside your brain...
items.summary_en: This French expression means to rack your brains. It paints a picture of digging inside your head to find an answer. The phrase is used when you think very hard about something.
items.summary_ko: 이 프랑스어 표현은 머리를 쥐어짜는 것을 의미합니다. 머릿속을 파고들어 답을 찾는 생생한 이미지를 담고 있습니다. 무언가를 깊이 생각할 때 사용하는 표현입니다.
items.title_en: French Expression of the Day: Se creuser la tête
items.title_ko: 오늘의 프랑스어 표현: Se creuser la tête
items.title_original: French Expression of the Day: Se creuser la tête

items.raw_excerpt: Dani Bensky and a group of women who were abused by Jeffrey Epstein have formed a bond they call a "survivor sisterhood." They live in two worlds, of advocacy and everyday life and motherhood.
items.summary_en: A group of women abused by Jeffrey Epstein have formed a close bond they call a survivor sisterhood. They balance advocacy work with everyday life and raising children.
items.summary_ko: 제프리 에프스타인에게 성폭력을 당한 여성들이 '생존자 자매결연'이라는 끈끈한 유대를 만들었다. 그들은 활동과 일상, 그리고 육아를 동시에 이어가고 있다.
items.title_en: Epstein survivors form a sisterhood of strength and motherhood
items.title_original: Todd Blanche's confirmation brings one Epstein survivor to center stage

items.raw_excerpt: Hyderabad Press Club delegation discusses electoral roll concerns with Telangana CEO Sudharshan Reddy, advocating for Permanent Residence Certificates and better training for Booth Level Officers.
items.summary_en: A delegation from the Hyderabad Press Club met with Telangana's Chief Electoral Officer Sudharshan Reddy. They asked for Permanent Residence Certificates to be accepted and for better training of Booth Level Officers to fix problems with voter lists.
items.summary_ko: 하이derabad 기자클럽 대표단이 텔랑가나 주 선거관리위원장 스다르샨 레디를 만났다. 영주거주증명서 인정과 투표소 담당자 교육 강화를 요구하며 유권자 명단 문제를 논의했다.
items.title_en: Hyderabad Press Club meets election chief over voter roll issues
items.title_ko: 하이derabad 기자클럽, 유권자 명단 문제로 선거 책임자 만남
items.title_original: Hyderabad Press Club delegation meets Telangana CEO Sudharshan Reddy, raises concerns over SIR
